reasoning: The course description indicates an in-depth introduction to organic chemistry, covering fundamentals of bonding, stereochemistry, reaction mechanisms, and functional group transformations. Given the complexity and depth of the subject matter, and assuming students have already completed prerequisites such as General Chemistry I and II, the course is estimated to require 12 weeks.
